length expanded from 10 to 13 in 2025. Three other variables measure payments that are made 
on behalf of the beneficiary and reduce the amount that he/she would normally have to pay for the 
PDE: LICS_AMT (amount paid by Part D low-income subsidy), OTHER_TROOP_AMT (other third-party 
payments that count towards the TrOOP amount), and PLRO_AMT (other third-party payments that 
do not count towards the TrOOP amount).
